summary: Stored Dataset Viewer and DFM last-used preferences per project and Windows user.
details: Dataset Viewer and DFM now store project-specific last-used reserving class, dataset, and DFM method preferences under projects/<project>/users/<windows-login>/preferences.json instead of using local AppData/browser-only preference storage for those fields.
Dataset picker preferences, reserving-class tree preferences, and hidden reserving-class paths are also stored in the project-user preference file so they copy with project duplication.
